verdict=ESCALATE
reason=The records indicate support for payout, but the policy requires the exact requested action boundary to be closed using the visible authority, scope, dependency, and current control state fields, which are not explicitly provided in the source records SRC-CASE-EDEFAB8BD143-SRC and SRC-CASE-EDEFAB8BD143-FLD.
